column5: The cart should contain both products from AnonymousCart and UserCart. No products should be lost or duplicated.
column6: Anonymous user has products in the cart (AnonymousCart). Logged-in user already has products in their cart (UserCart).
column12: Multi-step checkout > Cart > Merge carts
column13:
1. Add products to the cart as an anonymous user.
2. Log in with a registered customer account.
3. Open the cart.

column2: Merging Logic - No Duplicates
column5: The merged cart should show Product A (Qty: 3) (sum of both carts). No duplicate products should appear.
column6: Same product exists in both AnonymousCart and UserCart.
column12: Multi-step checkout > Cart > Merge carts
column13:
1. Add Product A (Qty: 1) to the cart as an anonymous user.
2. Log in as a customer (who also has Product A (Qty: 2) in their cart).
3. Open the cart.

column2: Cart Merge When Store Currency Changes
column5: All products should merge into a single currency cart. If any product is unavailable in the new currency, it should be displayed at price 0 with a warning message: 'This product is no longer available for purchase.'
column6: AnonymousCart contains products in USD. UserCart contains products in EUR (default customer currency).
column12: Multi-step checkout > Cart > Merge carts
column13:
1. As an anonymous user, add products in USD.
2. Log in as a user with a cart in EUR.
3. Check the cart contents.

column2: Cart Merge When User Logs Out & Logs In Again
column5: The merged cart should persist after logout. No products should be lost or duplicated.
column6: Anonymous user adds products to AnonymousCart. The user logs in (cart merges).
column12: Multi-step checkout > Cart > Merge carts
column13:
1. Log in and verify the merged cart.
2. Log out.
3. Log in again with the same user account.
4. Check the cart contents.

column2: Cart Merge with Different Product Types
column5: The merged cart should contain all products with correct attributes (size, color, etc.). No missing or mismatched products should appear.
column6: AnonymousCart contains simple products. UserCart contains configurable/bundle products.
